name: runpod-manager
title: RunPod Manager
description: List, inspect, start, and stop your RunPod Pods from Vicinae.
author: ian

commands.name: manage-pods
commands.title: Manage RunPod Pods
commands.subtitle: RunPod
commands.description: List running and stopped Pods, then start, stop, or inspect them.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: RunPod API Key
preferences.description: Restricted RunPod API key with permission to read, start, and stop Pods.

preferences.name: consoleUrl
preferences.title: RunPod Console URL
preferences.description: URL opened by the Open RunPod Console action.
